sections.description: A two-panel HTML generator for WordPress. Compose visually in TinyMCE on the left, watch the formatted HTML appear in real time on the right. Bundled TinyMCE 8.5.0 (GPL community edition) — no CDN, no API keys, no telemetry, no premium tier.
sections.changelog:
1.8.0

  • New: Self-hosted update checking via Plugin Update Checker 5.7, with the manifest served from the public HarbourBob/mbr-updates GitHub repo (raw URL) to bypass host-side caching.
  • Changed: Footer credit link now points to madebyrobert.co.uk (opens in new tab).
